title: Council Election #1 - First Round
brief: The first round of the first Star Atlas Council election. From 22 candidates and through ranked choice voting, the top 12 will continue to the second round of the election. In the second round of the election, the top 5 are officially elected Star Atlas Council members.
description:
# PIP-6 (Council Election #1 - First Round)

For more information regarding the Star Atlas Council, please refer to PIP-3 [here](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/f5e7cde1-9a02-4670-ae40-1c932a4b8dad).

# DAO Council Nominees

---

\
 
\
 

![ROME I Emperor](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/ROME_I_Emperor.png)

**Name:** ROME I Emperor

**Wallet Address:** G6kqzJbkvP8eKRR5WfwPbb9UxdCxPMGhsgAfbhJtjCWM

**Candidate Profile Info:** I am running to have an impact in changing the world. It is definitely cliché to say that. At the same time, it is true. We, the SA community, will be creating something groundbreaking alongside ATMTA. It is simple, I want to lend my life experience/expertise to be a part of that change.

**Social Media:** None

\
 
\
 

---

\
 
\
 

![Jith Blade](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/Jith_Blade.gif)

**Name:** Jith Blade

**Wallet Address:** 8W4cz2RL632jE3bqvjn2gTqcEZ3jydB8RW5N7VzT1wp3

**Candidate Profile Info:** For those that know my real life politics, they know that studying government structures and knowing how to create them is necessary for that line of work. I am committed to making sure that the Star Atlas DAO is set up in a way that will be both functional and give us the foundation to last for as long as possible. The first council term will be fundamental in making sure we have the tools needed to move forward and create a sustainable ecosystem, and I am looking forward to being a part of that regardless of whether I am on the council this time or not.

**Social Media:** None.

\
 
\
 

---

\
 
\
 

![DRUMCARL05](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/DRUMCARL05.png)

**Name:** DRUMCARL05

**Wallet Address:** 9PuiHY8b3ccv9Dsrwg8eTCntuxoML2VAo7UvtQzTg3VL

**Candidate Profile Info:** 

As DRUMCARL05, I am running for the Star Atlas Council because I believe in the power of community-driven governance and want to contribute my experience and dedication to the growth of Star Atlas. Having been an active member of this community since its inception, I've remained engaged through both the highs and lows, demonstrating my unwavering commitment to our shared vision.
There are several key reasons why I believe I would be a valuable addition to the council:

- Longevity and Consistency: My involvement from the beginning shows a deep understanding of Star Atlas's evolution and the community's needs.
- Representation for Spanish Speakers: As a voice for the Spanish-speaking community, I can help ensure that a significant portion of our global user base is heard and considered in governance matters.
- Mature and Balanced Approach: I bring a common-sense perspective to discussions, always striving for fair and thoughtful solutions that benefit the entire ecosystem.
- Clear Understanding of the Role: I recognize that a council member's primary function is not to impose personal opinions or decide on proposals, but to facilitate the democratic process. My focus will be on ensuring that all rule-compliant proposals reach the voting stage, empowering the community to make decisions.
- Commitment to Transparency: I pledge to maintain open communication with the community, explaining the rationale behind council decisions and seeking input on important matters.
- Bridge Builder: With my experience in both good and challenging times, I can help bridge different perspectives within the community, fostering unity and collaborative problem-solving.

By voting for me, you're choosing a candidate who respects the governance process, values community input, and is dedicated to the long-term success of Star Atlas. I am committed to serving as an impartial facilitator, ensuring that our governance system operates efficiently and fairly for all members of our diverse community.

**Social Media:**  [https://x.com/Carlito99897464](https://x.com/Carlito99897464) 

\
 
\

**Name:** Krigs

**Wallet Address:** 6kGPf6bPiMSWB1dUwengSJSe64JPwDrKz9YeZiHn6YQe

**Candidate Profile Info:** As a three-year Star Atlas community member and content creator, I seek application and nomination to the Star Atlas Council. My undergraduate and graduate education includes degrees in Political Science, National Security, and National Policy Planning. I serve in Command and Leadership roles within the government and have actively led teams from 50-500 members in size. I seek to apply my expertise of governance systems, governance, and democratic values to the Star Atlas DAO governance process to ensure PIPs are handled in an orderly and timely fashion. Further, I've served as an Executive Secretary to several high-ranking officials where both written and verbal communication skills were critical. I've drafted and corresponded on high-level matters of governance in my occupation with passion and rigor and look forward to continuing that passion with the Star Atlas DAO.

**Social Media:**  [https://x.com/Krigsfoniks](https://x.com/Krigsfoniks) & [https://x.com/Hologram_News](https://x.com/Hologram_News)

Although I don't have much experience in community management, I have strong evaluation and analytical skills, which help me understand various aspects of the project. I genuinely want to contribute to the building and development of Star Atlas. With my long-term involvement and understanding of the project, I believe I can bring valuable perspectives.

**Name:** JP

**Wallet Address:** 2GUKfGDNXK7QfeESH26KRoExW1XgHUqAd4y2sg5AMN16

**Candidate Profile Info:** 

I am running for the Council to leverage my extensive experience in business strategy, gaming, and DAO governance to drive positive change within Star Atlas. My commitment to enhancing transparency, fostering community engagement, and advancing the DAO’s strategic objectives aligns with my vision for a robust and inclusive governance framework. I believe in the transformative potential of decentralized communities and aim to contribute actively to Star Atlas' growth and success.

People should vote for me because I bring a unique blend of leadership, strategic insight, and a deep understanding of the gaming industry to the table. With a track record of effective decision-making and collaborative leadership in complex environments, I am dedicated to representing the community’s interests while ensuring responsible and forward-thinking governance. I am committed to maintaining open communication channels, promoting transparency, and driving initiatives that prioritize both the community and the DAO’s long-term sustainability.

**Social Media:**  [https://twitter.com/missionpoole](https://twitter.com/missionpoole)

**Candidate Profile Info:** I am a long time supporter or Star Atlas. I have extensive experience in web3 games since mid 2020. Having been in dozens of gaming projects I have seen what works and what doesn't. I have a sizable vested interest in Star Atlas and wish for this project to attract many users of all demographics. My motivation as council member, will be to facilitate the creation of pips, as well as mitigate the potential vulnerabilities they might create. My focus will be on economic stability, value creation for the DAO, and equity amongst players.

As an active member of the Star Atlas ecosystem, I believe that our collective voice should guide the future of the DAO. My goal is to foster productive discussions, support well-drafted PIPs, and contribute to a governance structure that reflects our community's interests and values. I’m committed to maintaining the integrity of the PIP process and ensuring our governance continues to evolve in a way that benefits us all.

![King Bryan](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/King_Bryan.jpg)

**Name:** King Bryan

**Wallet Address:** 92FK8LWvuk8UEwZodHA7bLL32hDaUqeoTHasnPyTa5Up

**Candidate Profile Info:** 

I'm running on a platform focused on DAO participation and ecosystem growth. The DAO is a gameloop, and our goal is to encourage as much participation as possible. Polis voters should feel both included and empowered in all assets of participation. Ecosystem growth involves expanding the Star Atlas DAO's presence in the broader universe. Our aim is for the DAO to become well-known across the entire crypto ecosystem, and eventually, in all gaming and traditional finance spaces. It will become the largest gaming DAO in existence, and I, along with Polis voters, will help usher in that era.

Polis holders should vote for me because of my diverse skills and expertise. As a barred California attorney with a Legal Masters in tax law, I bring a strong legal background to the DAO. Additionally, I am a software developer and run Cogent Crypto, a Solana mainnet validator with over $200M USD in Solana staked. I also operate a SUI node and am involved in various other crypto validator projects. With a current Polis PVP of over 5M and ranking among the top 5 Starbased players by LP points, I am deeply involved in all stages of Star Atlas. I have backed this conviction with my time, energy, and money, and I am fully committed to ensuring Star Atlas's success.

**Social Media:** [@Bryan_Cogent  (twitter)](https://x.com/Bryan_Cogent)

![Sim](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/Sim.jpeg)

**Name:** Sim

**Wallet Address:** 8FN19Rd6PXgucqFcwBVfDTUEceqfe7iYeEiyW9bay8Et

**Candidate Profile Info:** 

I firmly believe that the council needs people, first and foremost, before players or investors. People who can bring together the hearts of those who make up this wonderful community, which, with all its strengths and weaknesses, has remained united even in very difficult times. I believe that understanding both sides—the community and the team—is what is needed at this moment.

I see the council's position as a means that bestows both the responsibility and the honor upon its members to address the needs of the inhabitants of Galia, regardless of their playstyle, wallet size, or the language they speak.

Availability for dialogue and rationality must be the fuel and the engine of this metaverse.

**Social Media:** 

\
 
\
 

---

\
 
\
 

![Funcracker](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/1/Funcracker.png)

**Name:** Funcracker

**Wallet Address:** 3s6VUe21HFVEC6j12bPXLcrBHMkTZ66847853pXWXspr

**Candidate Profile Info:** 

Hey there!

I’m Ronald, though most of you know me as Funcracker. I’m based in the Netherlands and have been an avid gamer since I was ten years old. I studied computer science and game development (master’s) at the University of Utrecht, but rolled into a career in Website / Web Application development as demand for developers in that area was sky-high at the time.

I’ve been actively involved in the Star Atlas community since the launch of Rebirth and have earned some recognition along the way, being voted both *Community Member of the Year* (2022) and *Most Knowledgeable Community Member of the Year* (2024). I’ve organized the last two Solana Breakpoint community meetups and have served as a Community Moderator from the early days of the project.

Simply put, I’m passionate about Star Atlas—the project, the game, and the community surrounding it.

As a co-founder of Aephia Industries, a COPA-winning DAC in Star Atlas, I’ve spent the past three years immersing myself in DAOs. During this time, I’ve dedicated countless hours to studying the ins and outs of DAOs through videos, conferences, meetings, and articles—trying to learn how they can be structured for long-term success.

With my technical background and extensive knowledge of Star Atlas’ development, I believe I’m well-suited for this role. It’s going to be a significant time commitment, but my passion for the game and its DAO drives me forward. I’m excited to help guide well-structured PIPs through to the voting phase. I also look forward to contributing my DAO knowledge while continuing to expand my understanding of DAOs through hands-on experience.

**Social Media:** [https://x.com/ronaldtreur](https://x.com/ronaldtreur)
